title: Better Chainmail
description: Adds a vanilla and balanced way to craft Chainmail armor. With chainmail items
body:
###
[ 1.21 - 1.0 ]
Adds a vanilla and balanced way to craft Chainmail armor. > Latest changes: > **Warning will NOT work with older versions** > - Recreated mod outside of [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) for 1.21 with [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) > - Updated mod logo > - Update mod description > - It now cost 6 iron nuggets to make 1 chainmail > - It now cost only 1 chainmail to make a lantern > - Both normal and soul lanterns > - Chainmail crafting recipe is now shapeless > - Lanterns now have shapless crafting recipes --- ## How to make Chainmail Frist you take 6 irons nuggets and craft it into chainmail. (The recipe is shapeless)
Now you can take the chainmail that you have crafted and make armour the same way you make others.
Now you have made yourself some chainmail armour! A full set will cost 16 iron ingots, 8 less than a set of iron. --- You can also use a piece of chainmail to make a lantern.
